prompt: Outfit: an ivory-white off-the-shoulder mini dress in lightweight woven fabric, covered with a fine allover black ditsy floral print, featuring a wide elasticated off-shoulder neckline worn fully below both shoulders by design, trimmed all along the upper edge with a narrow black lace band, short ruffled sleeves resting around the upper arms rather than on the shoulders, each sleeve finished with a dangling black ribbon or cord detail at the outer side, a fully shirred and smocked bodice through the bust and waist for a close fitted shape, and a softly flared mini skirt with gathered volume and ruffled lower-tier shaping, with no visible front buttons or zipper, layered with a hidden inner top showing only slim pale blue lace-trim shoulder straps visible above both shoulders, paired with black over-the-knee sheer socks or stockings pulled high to the upper thighs with wide opaque black top bands clearly visible, a small black quilted leather-like crossbody bag with a compact rounded-rectangular body, a visible silver-tone top zipper, and a slim black chain strap worn diagonally from one shoulder across the front of the torso to the opposite hip, not carried by hand, plus a minimal random mix of tiny earrings with light visual volume, and black shoes generated to suit the outfit, preferably simple rounded-toe Mary Jane flats or low-profile pumps, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible shirring texture, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable fastening tension, natural fabric bunching, believable object contact, and secure accessory placement, not costume-like or cheap-looking.
promptEn: Outfit: an ivory-white off-the-shoulder mini dress in lightweight woven fabric, covered with a fine allover black ditsy floral print, featuring a wide elasticated off-shoulder neckline worn fully below both shoulders by design, trimmed all along the upper edge with a narrow black lace band, short ruffled sleeves resting around the upper arms rather than on the shoulders, each sleeve finished with a dangling black ribbon or cord detail at the outer side, a fully shirred and smocked bodice through the bust and waist for a close fitted shape, and a softly flared mini skirt with gathered volume and ruffled lower-tier shaping, with no visible front buttons or zipper, layered with a hidden inner top showing only slim pale blue lace-trim shoulder straps visible above both shoulders, paired with black over-the-knee sheer socks or stockings pulled high to the upper thighs with wide opaque black top bands clearly visible, a small black quilted leather-like crossbody bag with a compact rounded-rectangular body, a visible silver-tone top zipper, and a slim black chain strap worn diagonally from one shoulder across the front of the torso to the opposite hip, not carried by hand, plus a minimal random mix of tiny earrings with light visual volume, and black shoes generated to suit the outfit, preferably simple rounded-toe Mary Jane flats or low-profile pumps, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible shirring texture, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable fastening tension, natural fabric bunching, believable object contact, and secure accessory placement, not costume-like or cheap-looking.
promptZh: 服装：一件 象牙白 一字肩迷你裙，采用轻盈的梭织面料，通体覆盖着精致的 黑色碎花印花，设计上采用宽大的弹性一字领，完全露出双肩，上边缘饰有窄版黑色蕾丝带；短款荷叶袖垂落在上臂而非肩部，每只袖子外侧饰有垂坠的黑色丝带或绳结；胸部和腰部采用全褶皱弹性收腰设计，呈现修身剪裁；裙摆为微喇迷你裙，带有褶皱感和下层荷叶边设计，无可见的前扣或拉链。内搭一件隐形内衣，仅在双肩处露出细窄的淡蓝色蕾丝肩带。搭配 黑色过膝透肤袜，袜口拉至大腿上部，带有明显的宽边不透明黑色袜口。斜挎一个黑色小巧的仿皮绗缝包，包身呈圆润的长方形，配有明显的银色顶部拉链和细黑色链条，斜挎在躯干前，而非手提。配饰包括少量简约的小耳环，视觉感轻盈。鞋子搭配与服装风格相符的黑色鞋履，首选简约圆头玛丽珍平底鞋或低跟鞋。要求呈现高级面料质感、写实的服装结构、干净的缝线、自然的接缝张力、真实的布料重量、细微的褶皱、逼真的垂坠感、精致的边缘处理、清晰的褶皱纹理、真实的折痕、做工考究的服装细节、高品质的材质触感、细腻的服装真实感、真实的叠穿深度、可信的系带张力、自然的布料堆叠、真实的物体接触感以及稳固的配饰位置，避免廉价的演出服质感。
